nasb.text: And He *summoned the twelve and began to send them out in pairs, and gave them authority over the unclean spirits;

esv.text: And he called the twelve and began to send them out two by two, and gave them authority over the unclean spirits.

cnv.text: 他把十二門徒叫來，差遣他們兩個兩個地出去，賜給他們勝過污靈的權柄；

ccb.text: 耶稣召集了十二个使徒，差遣他们两个两个地出去，赐给他们制服污鬼的权柄，

csbs.text: 耶稣召来十二使徒，开始差派他们两个两个地出去，赐给他们权柄胜过污灵，
